name: scienceswarm
description: Open-source AI research workspace with a markdown-first second brain, MCP tooling, and multi-agent chat routing.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key used for chat, embeddings, and second-brain enrichment

OPENCLAW_URL.description: OpenClaw gateway websocket URL (defaults to ws://127.0.0.1:18789/ws)

BRAIN_ROOT.description: Filesystem path to the markdown second brain (defaults to SCIENCESWARM_DIR/brain or ~/.scienceswarm/brain)

SCIENCESWARM_USER_HANDLE.description: Author handle attached to every brain write (for example @researcher)

_comment_skills: The runtime loads public product skills from the checked-in .openclaw/skills projection.
